# Updated: 2026-05-19 23:30 GMT+8 by CLAUDE_CODE (Opus 4.7 — Sub-batch 4.1c SHIPPED to main)

PHASE:        Phase 8 Batch 4 IN PROGRESS. Sub-batches 4.1a (AreaBoundary) + 4.1b (PatrolTrack) + 4.1c (FuelEntry + ReportExport) SHIPPED to main. 2 sub-batches remain (4.1d NotificationRecipient split, 4.1e Event/Patrol attribution FKs).

LAST_DONE:    Sub-batch 4.1c FuelEntry + ReportExport scaffolds SHIPPED to main via squash-merge from feat/fuel-entry-report-export-scaffold (single Opus 4.7 dispatch, ~60K actual context). Branch deleted. Origin/main updated. Schema: ReportType{coverage,area,consolidated,detailed,rangers,patrol_filtered} + PaperSize{A4,Letter,Legal} + ReportExportStatus{queued,rendering,ready,failed} enums + FuelEntry model (cuid PK, tenant_id FK RESTRICT, area_name string, area_boundary_id nullable FK with SET NULL preserving area_name snapshot, date_received DATE, liters DECIMAL(12,3), total_price DECIMAL(14,2), currency string, receipt_photo_url + notes nullable, logged_by_user_id FK RESTRICT, 3 indexes on tenant+date+boundary) + ReportExport model (cuid PK, tenant_id FK RESTRICT, requested_by_user_id FK RESTRICT, report_type + paper_size + status enums, params_json JSONB, file_path/file_size_bytes/error_message + completed_at nullable, 3 indexes on tenant+status+createdAt) + back-relations on Tenant/User/AreaBoundary. Migrations (2 separate per task spec): 20260519231300_add_fuel_entry (additive only — 1 table, 3 indexes, 3 FK constraints — tenant_id RESTRICT, area_boundary_id SET NULL, logged_by_user_id RESTRICT; down.sql is DROP TABLE only) and 20260519231301_add_report_export (additive only — 3 enum types, 1 table, 3 indexes, 2 FK constraints — tenant_id RESTRICT, requested_by_user_id RESTRICT; down.sql drops table then 3 enums in dependency order). Shared schemas: fuel-entry.ts (fuelEntrySchema + createFuelEntryInputSchema + updateFuelEntryInputSchema with Decimal-as-string regex + positive refinement) + report-export.ts (reportExportSchema + createReportExportInputSchema + getDownloadUrlInputSchema) + 3 enum additions to enums.ts. Routers: fuelEntry (list/getById/create [operator+]/update [ownership-checked]/updateAny [coordinator+ no ownership check]/delete [site_admin+] — RBAC split per spec §405-408 since single update would entangle ownership + role checks) + reportExport (list/getById/pollStatus/create [coordinator+ inserts queued row — does NOT enqueue BullMQ yet, future batch]/getDownloadUrl [returns {downloadUrl: null, status} when not ready, canonical /[tenantId]/exports/[id]/download URL when status=ready, throws NOT_FOUND for missing rows — no cross-tenant existence leak]). Both mounted on appRouter. Tests: 21 new across 2 files (fuelEntry.test.ts 12 cases — list scoping + pagination, getById success + cross-tenant null, create with currency snapshot from tenant + ownership stamping, update ownership-checked happy + cross-tenant null + non-owner reject, updateAny no ownership check, delete success + cross-tenant null + RBAC reject for operator; reportExport.test.ts 9 cases — list tenant scoping, getById success + cross-tenant null, pollStatus slim shape, create with status=queued + requestedBy stamp + RBAC reject for operator, getDownloadUrl returns null for non-ready + canonical URL for ready + throws NOT_FOUND for missing row). Currency snapshot per spec §196: pulled from prisma.tenant.findFirst at create time, not from session (session doesn't carry currency). Verification: pnpm typecheck 0 errors (shared + web; db pre-existing Node-types failures unchanged from main baseline — same condition shipped on 4.1a/4.1b), pnpm lint 0 warnings (--max-warnings 0), vitest 260/260 passing across 37 test files (was 239 across 35; +21 new; zero regressions). Two new lessons added to lessons.md: 🔴 "Prisma migrate dev sweeps multiple new models into one migration" (--name doesn't control which model lands where — split by hand after sweep) and 🟡 "Zod cuid() strict format check" (test fixtures need 25-char cuid-shaped strings starting with 'c').

NEXT:         Open a FRESH Claude Code session and say "Start Sub-batch 4.1d" to begin NotificationRecipient split with data migration. ⚠ This is the ONLY sub-batch in Batch 4 with real data migration risk (Tier 3 per BATCH_4_PLAN). See plan below.
